description_long: This is a modern, freestanding shelving unit constructed primarily from light-colored wood or wood laminate. The design features a staggered, geometric arrangement of open cuboid compartments, creating a visually interesting and functional storage solution. The shelves are of varying sizes, with some compartments fully open on both sides and others backed, providing both display and storage options. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the piece a natural and warm appearance suitable for urban interiors or public spaces. The structure is solid and boxy, with clean, straight edges and a flat base for stability. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, emphasizing its open and accessible design.
description: A modern, light wood shelving unit with staggered open cuboid compartments and a clean, geometric design. The piece features visible wood grain and offers both display and storage space.
description_view_0: Front view showing the staggered arrangement of open and backed cuboid compartments, highlighting the geometric design and storage/display spaces.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and the stepped profile of the unit, with no visible compartments from this angle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panels of some compartments and the open backs of others, emphasizing the alternating open and closed sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the stepped profile and the solid wood construction.
